role_justifications.conductor: classifies the CSS tokenization run and enforces real delegation
role_justifications.planner: plans tokenization-only substitutions and parity gates
role_justifications.change_verifier: verifies diff shape, no selector/important changes, no oversized files
role_justifications.a11y_auditor: checks focus/layout accessibility risk from spacing/radius tokenization
role_justifications.critic: checks cascade, importance, and computed-style drift risks
